title: gronophyllum affine
intro: Gronophyllum affine, also known as the Asian ironwood or Malay ironwood, is a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. The bark and roots of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gronophyllum affine include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
